onSettingsEditorOpen.descriptionOverride: GitHub Copilot is an AI-powered coding assistant that helps you write code faster and smarter.

ms-vscode.sublime-keybindings.name: Sublime Text Keymap and Settings Importer

ms-windows-ai-studio.windows-ai-studio.name: AI Toolkit for Visual Studio Code

aiGeneratedWorkspaceTrust.title: This workspace was generated by GitHub Copilot
aiGeneratedWorkspaceTrust.checkboxText: Trust the contents of all files in this workspace
aiGeneratedWorkspaceTrust.dontTrustOption: No, I don't trust the contents
aiGeneratedWorkspaceTrust.startupTrustRequestLearnMore: If you don't trust the contents of the files generated by GitHub Copilot, we recommend continuing in restricted mode. See [our docs](https://aka.ms/vscode-workspace-trust) to learn more.

github.copilot.nextEditSuggestions.enabl.name: CopilotNextEditSuggestions
github.copilot.nextEditSuggestions.enabl.description: Whether to enable next edit suggestions (NES). NES can propose a next edit based on your recent changes.

github.copilot.chat.reviewSelection.enab.name: CopilotReviewSelection
github.copilot.chat.reviewSelection.enab.description: Enables code review on current selection.

github.copilot.chat.claudeAgent.enabled.name: Claude3PIntegration
github.copilot.chat.claudeAgent.enabled.description: Enable Claude Agent sessions in VS Code. Start and resume agentic coding sessions powered by Anthropic Claude Agent SDK directly in the editor. Uses your existing Copilot subscription.

chatSessionRecommendations.name: codex
chatSessionRecommendations.description: Codex is OpenAI's coding agent that helps you write, review, and ship code faster.

chatSessionRecommendations.name: cli
chatSessionRecommendations.description: Delegate tasks to a background agent.

chatSessionRecommendations.name: cloud
chatSessionRecommendations.description: Delegate tasks to the GitHub Copilot Cloud Agent. The agent works asynchronously in the cloud to implement changes, iterates via chat, and can create or update pull requests as needed.
